script.title: The Lying City
script.logline: A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lies.

beat_sheet.title: Untitled
beat_sheet.logline: A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lies.

beats.title: Opening Image
beats.description: An image that sets the tone and introduces the world of the story.
beats.summary: [Opening Image] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the opening image of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Theme Stated
beats.description: Someone states the theme of the story, often in passing.
beats.summary: [Theme Stated] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the theme stated of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Setup
beats.description: We see what the protagonist's life is like before the story begins. We see their flaws and desires.
beats.summary: [Setup] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the setup of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Catalyst
beats.description: A major event that changes the protagonist's life forever. The 'inciting incident.'
beats.summary: [Catalyst] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the catalyst of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Debate
beats.description: The protagonist debates whether to take action. They resist the call to adventure.
beats.summary: [Debate] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the debate of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Break into Two
beats.description: The protagonist makes a decisive choice to enter the new world/situation.
beats.summary: [Break into Two] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the break into two of the narrative arc.

beats.title: B Story
beats.description: A new relationship or subplot begins (often the love story).
beats.summary: [B Story] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the b story of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Fun and Games
beats.description: The promise of the premise. The fun parts the audience came to see.
beats.summary: [Fun and Games] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the fun and games of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Midpoint
beats.description: A major event that raises the stakes. False victory or false defeat.
beats.summary: [Midpoint] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the midpoint of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Bad Guys Close In
beats.description: The antagonist's forces close in. Internal and external pressures mount.
beats.summary: [Bad Guys Close In] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the bad guys close in of the narrative arc.

beats.title: All Is Lost
beats.description: The lowest point. The hero loses everything. 'The death of the hero' (literal or metaphorical).
beats.summary: [All Is Lost] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the all is lost of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Dark Night of the Soul
beats.description: The hero wallows in despair. But then they find inspiration.
beats.summary: [Dark Night of the Soul] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the dark night of the soul of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Break into Three
beats.description: The hero has an epiphany and finds the solution to the problem.
beats.summary: [Break into Three] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the break into three of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Finale
beats.description: The hero confronts the antagonist and resolves the story. The theme is proven true.
beats.summary: [Finale] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the finale of the narrative arc.

beats.title: Final Image
beats.description: The opposite of the opening image. Shows how the protagonist has changed.
beats.summary: [Final Image] — In the story of 'A detective must solve a murder in a city where everyone lie...', this beat marks the final image of the narrative arc.

characters.name: Protagonist 1
characters.motivation: To overcome their core wound and achieve their goal.
characters.physical_description: The protagonist's physical appearance should reflect their inner journey.
characters.voice_notes: Distinctive speech pattern that sets them apart.
characters.costume_notes: Clothing that evolves with their character arc.
characters.visual_anchor: A distinctive visual element that identifies them instantly.
characters.backstory: A past event that shaped their core wound or desire.

characters.name: Antagonist 2
characters.motivation: To achieve their goal at any cost, even if it harms others.
characters.physical_description: Physically imposing or subtly menacing presence.
characters.visual_anchor: A signature prop or visual motif.
characters.backstory: A motivation that makes them sympathetic despite their actions.
characters.arc_summary: Their plan threatens the protagonist's world.

characters.name: Mentor 3
characters.motivation: To ensure the protagonist succeeds where they once failed.
characters.backstory: A past failure that drives their desire to guide the protagonist.
characters.arc_summary: Passes the torch to the protagonist.

characters.name: Ally 4
characters.motivation: To help the protagonist succeed and protect their bond.
characters.backstory: A shared history or bond with the protagonist.
characters.arc_summary: Supports the protagonist through the journey.

characters.name: Sidekick 5
characters.motivation: To prove their worth and earn the protagonist's respect.
characters.physical_description: Smaller, less imposing than the protagonist.
characters.backstory: Admires the protagonist and wants to prove themselves.
characters.arc_summary: Grows from eager follower to independent hero.
